limits.noApiKey: Limits are not available. Enter an API key.
limits.note.groq:
Groq: showing live rate-limit headers (if returned by API) + fallback model limits.
More info: console.groq.com/docs/rate-limits
limits.note.openrouter:
OpenRouter: showing usage/credits/limit data from the API key + estimated free-tier rate limits.
More info: openrouter.ai/docs
limits.note.gemini:
Google does not provide an API for limits inspection. Check limits manually in AI Studio or Google Cloud Console → Quotas.
Limits reset at midnight Pacific Time.
